steps.title: Identify what creates the problem
steps.content: The passage states that stored energy can mitigate effects of “______ solar energy collection caused by unpredictable shifts in cloud cover and haze.” The phrase “unpredictable shifts” reveals what causes the problem storage must address.

steps.title: Select the word for instability
steps.content:
The blank describes the kind of solar energy collection caused by unpredictable cloud cover and haze — the word "unpredictable" tells us the blank must name an up-and-down instability in solar output. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Incentives for: financial or motivational encouragements — this describes policy motivations, not the physical variability of solar energy levels. ✘
  • Choice B — Calibrations with: precise adjustments or measurements — this describes technical fine-tuning, not the irregular output caused by shifting weather. ✘
  • Choice C — Developments of: growth or advances in — this describes progress in solar technology, not the variable output caused by cloud cover. ✘
  • Choice D — Fluctuations in: irregular variations up and down — directly matches "unpredictable shifts"; stored energy compensates for the times solar collection dips. ✔
That matches choice D — D is correct.
